column1: procedure

Reduction experiment of WO3/SiO2: load the catalyst into a quartz sample tube and flow pure H2 at 40 mL/min. Stabilize under pure H2 flow for 30 min, ramp to 450 C at 5 C/min, soak for 1 h, then passively cool to ambient temperature.
